scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor, AppError reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs.

observations.text: Exact pattern fidelity — file layout, naming, DI style all mirror ProductService
AppError reused correctly with WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND code, no custom error class
5 tests covering both happy and guard paths for all 3 ACs
Guard-path test for updateCapacity verifies save is never called on not-found — thorough
No deviations or escalations reported, consistent with clean pattern match
